emissions_tax.coverage: CBO 60962 covered energy-related CO2 and specified large-facility greenhouse-gas emissions; retain existing methane-charge interaction

household_dividend.unit: equal adult share; qualifying dependents receive one-half share
household_dividend.eligibility: same person and residency rules as the household consumption protection credit
household_dividend.payment: quarterly through the same Treasury rails, with nonfiler access
household_dividend.benefit_treatment: excluded from federal means-tested benefit income and resources
household_dividend.timing: first payment no later than the end of the first full calendar quarter of tax collection
household_dividend.reconciliation: underpayments corrected; ordinary eligibility-estimate errors not clawed back absent fraud or material misrepresentation

anti_capture: beneficiaries and workers may apply directly where administrable
competitive contracts publish beneficial ownership and performance
no recipient receives privileged ballot or evidence status
unspent transition funds remain restricted and do not become assumed deficit savings
